free_text: New data on Ho(alpha,x) reactions and the aspects of
The holmium oxide Ho2O3 ~ 50 mg (99.99 %, purity, +
1-2 % dinitrocellulose, 11 layers) was used. The Ho2O3
layers with a thickness of 3-16 + - 10% mg/cm2 and a
spot diameter of 20 mm were obtained as a result of
sedimentation and after drying at room temperature.
The aluminum foil (8.4 + -0.5 mu-m) was used for the
protection of the layer from mechanical damage.
Beam current was 120 nA, beam diameter was ~ 18 mm.

purity germanium detector with energy resolution 850 eV
for the 122 keV line and 1.8 keV for the 1330 keV line
